src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Add new cache key prefix constants for tenant region and compartment ID to support new caching logic.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.human_impl:
public static final String PREFIX_TENANT_REGION = "tenant_region_";
public static final String PREFIX_TENANT_COMPARTMENT_ID = "tenant_compartment_id_";

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Add a new boolean field to the DTO to track the absence of a public VCN.
Add compartmentId field to the nested configuration class to support OCI compartment identification.
Add a new field to store the OCI region associated with the creation task.
Change the proxied field from Boolean wrapper to boolean primitive to simplify usage or enforce non-null semantics.
Remove validation annotations for prefix, proxied, and ttl fields, likely because they are now handled differently or made optional.
Rename the 'name' field to 'prefix' to better reflect its semantic meaning as a domain prefix.
Remove the @NotBlank validation constraint from the renamed 'prefix' field.
Change the 'proxied' field from Boolean object to primitive boolean to simplify usage.
Remove the @NotNull validation constraint from the 'proxied' field.
Remove the @NotNull and @Min validation constraints from the 'ttl' field.
